title: pellaea limitanea
intro: Pellaea limitanea, also known as the narrow-leaved button fern or limitanea fern, is a species of fern native to the southwestern region of Western Australia. The Pellaea limitanea plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pellaea limitanea include the treatment of various skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Pellaea limitanea can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves for topical application, and its leaves can also be dried and used as a tea.
